sections.content:

<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
print("Current nodes:")
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] in ['W', 'R', 'N', 'O']:
        print(f"  {n['color']}: id={n['id']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary'][:4]}...")

# Check ascii
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nDoor region (rows 28-50, cols 25-55):")
for i in range(28, 50):
    print(f"{i:2d}: {ascii_lines[i][25:55]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
